ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Getting started with Stylized Looks in RenderMan is very straightforward and can be achieved in one of 2 ways.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 开始使用 RenderMan 中的 Stylized Looks 非常直接，可以通过 2 种方式完成。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: The first way is to use the automatic setup route by simply selecting your objects and clicking on the Stylized shelf button. This will:
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 第一种方式是使用自动设置流程：只需选择 objects，然后点击 Stylized shelf button。这将会：

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Enable Stylized Looks in the Render Settings and add in all the Stylized AOVs that are required
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 在 Render Settings 中执行 Enable Stylized Looks，并添加所需的全部 Stylized AOVs

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Adds and connects a PxrStylizedControl node to each of the surface shaders for the selected objects
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 为所选 objects 的每个 surface shaders 添加并连接一个 PxrStylizedControl node

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Add a Hatching display filter, so you are ready to get Stylized Rendering!
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 添加一个 Hatching display filter，这样就可以开始 Stylized Rendering 了！
Enable Stylized Looks（启用 Stylized Looks）
Attach Stylized Pattern（附加 Stylized Pattern）
Attach Stylized Display Filters（附加 Stylized Display Filters）
Enable Stylized Looks（启用 Stylized Looks）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: The power behind the Stylized Looks system in RenderMan lies with the
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: RenderMan 中 Stylized Looks system 的核心能力来自
custom set of AOVs（自定义 AOV 集）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: that the system needs to determine such features as Hatching, line work, and toon shading.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: ，系统需要这些 AOVs 来确定 Hatching、line work 和 toon shading 等特征。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Luckily in Maya, setting these AOVs up is a one-click process.  Simply click on "Enable Stylized Looks" and RenderMan for Maya will create all the necessary AOVs for you.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 幸运的是，在 Maya 中设置这些 AOVs 是一键流程。只需点击 "Enable Stylized Looks"，RenderMan for Maya 就会为你创建所有必要的 AOVs。
View AOVs（查看 AOVs）
RenderMan preferences
Attach Stylized Pattern - PxrStylizedControl（附加 Stylized Pattern - PxrStylizedControl）
PxrStylizedControl
node 连接到 Materials 的
Utility Pattern
input（Materials 输入）。
Attach Stylized Display Filters（附加 Stylized Display Filters）
Stylized Looks Display Filters
PxrStylizedHatching

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: - This filter adds an art-driven generalization of illustrative Hatching.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: - 此 filter 会添加由艺术驱动的 illustrative Hatching 概括效果。
PxrStylizedLines

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Add curvature line work, outlines, and other cool and unique looks
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 添加 curvature line work、outlines 以及其他很酷且独特的 looks
PxrStylizedToon

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: - The perfect Display Filter for adding stepped toon shading effects
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: - 这是用于添加 stepped toon shading effects 的理想 Display Filter
Stylized Looks Tip（Stylized Looks 提示）
PxrBackgroundDisplayFilter

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Get creative with your lighting from the selection of RenderMan lights.  Remember, the smaller the light, the sharper your shadows will look.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 从 RenderMan lights 的选择中发挥你的 lighting 创意。请记住，light 越小，shadows 看起来越锐利。
5. Interactive Rendering（交互式渲染）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: One of the main strengths of the Stylized Looks system is that artists can see these new treatments directly in the rendering viewport of the authoring application as they move lights, change geometry, alter animation, and adjust shading parameters.  This “in-camera” capability in the same application can dramatically speed up artistic explorations and decision making.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Stylized Looks system 的主要优势之一，是 artists 在移动 lights、改变 geometry、调整 animation 和 shading parameters 时，可以直接在创作应用的 rendering viewport 中看到这些新的 treatments。同一应用中的这种 “in-camera” 能力可以显著加快艺术探索和决策。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: 6. Combine Display Filters to really get creative
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 6. Combine Display Filters to really get creative（组合 Display Filters，真正发挥创意）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: A lot of customization is possible since many of the treatments can be driven by painted or procedural maps.  In addition, the specialized display filters that apply the treatments are driven by pattern signals that are selected by artists. It is easy (and fun!) to come up with novel uses of the supplied pattern AOVs or add others to the mix. Effects can also be driven by rendering quantities such as light intensity, light filter domain, facing ratios, distance from the camera, etc.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 由于许多 treatments 可以由 painted maps 或 procedural maps 驱动，因此可以进行大量 customization。此外，应用这些 treatments 的 specialized display filters 由 artists 选择的 pattern signals 驱动。为提供的 pattern AOVs 找到新颖用法，或向组合中添加其他 AOVs，都很容易（也很有趣！）。Effects 也可以由 light intensity、light filter domain、facing ratios、distance from the camera 等 rendering quantities 驱动。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Create a PxrStylizedToon as your first Stylized filter, then add a PxrStylizedHatching filter with the halftone preset applied, and then create your unique look by adding a PxrStylizedLines filter to create beautiful and detailed outlines.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 创建 PxrStylizedToon 作为第一个 Stylized filter，然后添加一个应用 halftone preset 的 PxrStylizedHatching filter，接着添加 PxrStylizedLines filter 来创建漂亮且细致的 outlines，从而形成独特 look。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: The Stylized Looks display filter nodes can also be daisy-chained to produce a layered composition of looks, and those permutations are endless.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Stylized Looks display filter nodes 也可以 daisy-chained（菊链连接），产生 layered composition of looks，而这些排列组合几乎无穷无尽。
